issues.description: Accordion.php missing @var docblock for camelCase attribute variables
issues.fix: Add @var docblock at the top of the file documenting $exclusiveMode and $alwaysOneOpen variables to prevent PHP_CodeSniffer warnings for camelCase variables
issues.details: PHP_CodeSniffer warns about camelCase variables like $exclusiveMode and $alwaysOneOpen because WordPress coding standards prefer snake_case. Adding a @var docblock tells the linter these variables come from block attributes (which use camelCase from JavaScript) and should be ignored.
issues.suggestedDocblock:
<?php
/**
 * Accordion block frontend template.
 *
 * Available variables (auto-extracted from $attributes):
 * @var string $anchor
 * @var string $blockVariation
 * @var string $eyebrow
 * @var string $heading
 * @var string $description
 * @var array $buttons
 * @var string $mediaType
 * @var int $mediaId
 * @var array $focalPoint
 * @var string $videoSource
 * @var int $videoFile
 * @var string $videoId
 * @var array $posterImage
 * @var bool $exclusiveMode
 * @var bool $alwaysOneOpen
 *
 * Also available:
 * @var string $children Inner blocks content
 * @var WP_Block $block Block instance
 */
?>
